Task.Name: Appoint Bravo Programme Leads (BGSW and JV-Tata)
Set Up PMO Tools and Collaboration Site
Signing - Frozen Zone Activated
Task.Notes: Resources: BGSW + Tata Executive | No AI IT production changes without SteerCo approval from this date

Task.Name: 0.2 BGSW AI IT Landscape Assessment (2 India Sites)
Task.Notes: Resources: BGSW IT + Riyaz Ahmed | 2 India sites

Task.Name: AI IT Inventory (17 Apps / 70 Users / 2 Sites)
Task.Notes: Resources: BGSW IT PM | 17 AI apps; 70 users; 2 India sites; no ERP; no SAP

Task.Name: JV Legal Entity Preparation (India MCA Registration)
Task.Notes: Resources: Legal + Finance | 50/50 Tata-Bosch JV; Bosch leadership control; not antitrust relevant; no regulatory filing required

Task.Name: Identify AI IT Dependencies on BGSW Shared Services
Task.Notes: Resources: BGSW IT Architects | Minimal dependencies; Bosch-led JV remains closely aligned with BGSW operations post-GoLive

Task.Name: Define Scope - 17 AI Apps, 70 Users, 2 India Sites
Task.Notes: Resources: Riyaz Ahmed + BGSW IT | No ERP; No SAP; No TSA post-GoLive; Bosch-led JV; Combination model

Task.Name: JV Operating Framework Confirmation
Task.Notes: Resources: Riyaz Ahmed + Legal | Bosch leadership control; 50/50 JV with Tata; not antitrust relevant; JV continues under Bosch governance

Task.Name: QG0 - Initialization Quality Gate
Task.Notes: Resources: Steering Committee | Charter approved; inventory confirmed (17 apps, 70 users, 2 India sites); JV governance agreed; proceed to Concept

Task.Name: Application Deep-Dive - 17 AI Apps
Task.Notes: Resources: BGSW IT Architects | Classify all 17 apps: retain in JV / retire / re-host; no ERP or SAP in scope

Task.Name: Data Ownership and Separation Rules
Task.Notes: Resources: Riyaz Ahmed + Legal | AI data vs BGSW corporate data; simplified by Bosch JV leadership

Task.Name: Contract and Licence Review - 17 AI Apps
Task.Notes: Resources: BGSW Procurement + IT | Change-of-control clause review for all 17 AI applications

Task.Name: HR IT Mapping - 70 AI Business Users
Task.Notes: Resources: BGSW HR IT | India payroll and HR for 70 users across 2 India sites

Task.Name: Phase 2 - Architecture and Design
Task.Notes: Resources: BGSW IT Architects + Riyaz Ahmed

Task.Name: 2.1 JV IT Architecture Design
Task.Notes: Resources: BGSW IT Architects + Riyaz Ahmed

Task.Name: JV Architecture Workshop (Combination Model)
Task.Notes: Resources: BGSW + Tata Architects | Confirms Combination JV model; Bosch leadership; JV IT target state defined

Task.Name: M365 and Azure Tenant Design - JV Entity (<70 Mailboxes)
Task.Notes: Resources: BGSW Azure Team | New M365 tenant; <70 mailboxes; Teams and OneDrive in scope

Task.Name: Active Directory Design - JV Forest
Task.Notes: Resources: BGSW AD Team | New AD forest for JV; fully separate from BGSW corporate AD

Task.Name: Network Architecture - 2 India JV Sites
Task.Notes: Resources: BGSW Infra | Domestic India connectivity across 2 JV sites; no international WAN required

Task.Name: Security Architecture - JV Entity
Task.Notes: Resources: BGSW CISO | JV security independent of BGSW; ISO 27001 baseline; Bosch security standards retained

Task.Name: Application Migration Plan - 17 Apps (Single Wave)
Task.Notes: Resources: Riyaz Ahmed + WS Leads | Single wave; all 17 apps; Bosch-led JV simplifies target endpoint configuration

Task.Name: Detailed Project Plan and Budget Baseline
Azure and Cloud Environment Setup - JV
Active Directory Build - JV Forest
Task.Notes: Resources: BGSW AD Team | Foundation for all 70 JV users and 17 AI applications; no backout possible

Task.Name: Security and IAM Platform Setup - JV
Application Reconfiguration for JV - 17 Apps
Task.Notes: Resources: Dev Teams | Re-point 17 apps from BGSW to JV AD / M365 / Azure; Bosch-led JV simplifies target configuration

Task.Name: Device Reimaging - JV Standard Image (70 Devices)
Task.Notes: Resources: BGSW CWP | JV domain image across 2 India sites

Task.Name: User Acceptance Testing (UAT) - 70 Users
Task.Notes: Resources: Business Key Users | JV AI business users confirm Day 1 readiness across 2 India sites

Task.Name: Security and Penetration Testing - JV Environment
QG1/2/3 - Combined Quality Gate (Concept + Architecture + Build)
Task.Notes: Resources: Steering Committee | Architecture approved; all 17 apps reconfigured and tested; 70 devices configured; UAT passed; proceed to GoLive preparation

Task.Name: Cutover Plan Finalisation and Go No-Go Assessment
Task.Notes: Resources: All WS Leads + Riyaz Ahmed

Task.Name: Help Desk Activation and Training - JV
Task.Notes: Resources: IT Ops | India support coverage for 70 JV AI users across 2 sites ready before GoLive

Task.Name: End-User Pre-GoLive Communication - 70 AI Business Users
Task.Notes: Resources: Comms + BGSW IT | Pre-GoLive communication to all 70 AI users across 2 India sites

Task.Name: QG4 - Pre-GoLive Quality Gate
Task.Notes: Resources: Steering Committee | Cutover plan approved; all 17 apps ready; 70 users and devices ready; JV infra stable; DAY 1 GOLIVE AUTHORISED

Task.Name: 4.2 Day 1 GoLive
Task.Notes: Resources: All Workstreams | GoLive proceeds only after QG4 passed on 30 Jun 2026

Task.Name: Day 1 - JV IT GoLive (Legal Separation Effective)
Task.Notes: Resources: Executive Leadership | Bosch-led JV AI IT fully separated from BGSW; JV IT independent from this date; no TSA required

Task.Name: Network Domain Cutover to JV Active Directory
Application Day 1 Activation - All 17 AI Apps
User Go-Live Communication - 70 AI Business Users
Daily Operations Review Meetings
Task.Notes: Resources: Riyaz Ahmed + WS Leads | India standup cadence; JV AI systems stability; Bosch-led escalation path available

Task.Name: Application Stability Monitoring - 17 Apps
Task.Notes: Resources: App Teams + IT Ops | No TSA; JV Bosch-led; escalation via normal BGSW governance channels

Task.Name: QG5 - Programme Closure Quality Gate
Task.Notes: Resources: Steering Committee | Hypercare stable; JV IT fully operational under Bosch governance; all 17 apps stable; Project Bravo formally closed
